title: Payment session persistence in wallet DB
description: Add payment_sessions table to wallet SQLite schema. Load active sessions on startup to resume watching. On reconnect: if peer is online and session is in-flight (Requested/Addressed), resend the last message to re-sync state. If session is Watching, re-register address with watcher.
close_reason: Implemented by nie-421 (WalletStore wired) and nie-0aj (session resync on startup)
